title: Xponential Digital Workouts Debut on lululemon Studio
text: IRVINE, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Xponential Fitness, the largest global franchisor of boutique fitness brands, announced today the debut of its workouts across four brands – Pure Barre, Rumble, AKT and YogaSix – on lululemon Studio. Launched October 5, the new service from lululemon builds upon more than 10,000 on-demand and live-streamed classes that have been available with a MIRROR subscription, and adds a breadth of content from notable fitness and wellness partners like Xponential Fitness.
